# ParagonTooltipChrome.BannerByPlacement property

Banner-style chrome variants (`TooltipBanner_Map`, `TooltipBanner_Town`) keyed by their placement-token (the suffix on the SNO name). Not the same shape as the panel chrome; included as future-proofing for any non-tooltip banner work.

```csharp
public IReadOnlyDictionary<string, AssetRef> BannerByPlacement { get; set; }
```
